mnemonics.title: UNION MEMORY CONCEPT
mnemonics.content: THINK OF UNION AS ONE ROOM WITH MULTIPLE PURPOSES - THE ROOM (MEMORY) IS ONE SIZE, BUT CAN BE A BEDROOM, KITCHEN, OR OFFICE AT DIFFERENT TIMES, NOT SIMULTANEOUSLY.

mnemonics.title: STRUCTURE VS UNION
mnemonics.content:
S - SEPARATE (EACH MEMBER GETS OWN SPACE)
U - UNIFIED (ALL MEMBERS SHARE ONE SPACE) - SUGAR IN ONE BOWL VS MULTIPLE BOWLS.

mnemonics.title: UNION SIZE RULE
mnemonics.content: UNION SIZE = BIGGEST MEMBER'S SIZE - THINK OF IT AS THE TALLEST PERSON IN A GROUP - THE ROOM MUST FIT THE TALLEST.

acronyms.expansion: U - UNIQUE (one location) N - UNIFIED (shared) I - INTERPRETATION (different views) O - ONE (active at a time) N - NECESSARY (for efficiency)
acronyms.usage: Remembering that union provides different interpretations of the same memory location, with only one active at a time

acronyms.expansion: T - TYPE (indicator) A - ADDED (extra field) G - GIVES (information) G - ABOUT (active type) E - ENUM (used) D - DISCRIMINATOR (field)
acronyms.usage: Remembering that tagged unions use an enum or type indicator to track which member is currently valid

visualTips.visualization: DRAW A SINGLE BOX (LIKE ONE SLICE OF BREAD). LABEL IT WITH EACH MEMBER NAME - INT, FLOAT, CHAR - ALL OVERLAPPING IN THE SAME SPACE. USE ARROWS TO SHOW HOW THE SAME MEMORY ADDRESS POINTS TO DIFFERENT DATA TYPES.
DRAW MULTIPLE ADJACENT BOXES SIDE BY SIDE, EACH LABELED WITH A MEMBER NAME. SHOW THAT EACH HAS ITS OWN SEPARATE SPACE.
THINK OF A UNION AS LOOKING AT THE SAME PHOTOGRAPH THROUGH DIFFERENT COLORED LENSES - SAME IMAGE (MEMORY), DIFFERENT COLORS (INTERPRETATION).

analogies.analogy: ONE DESK (UNION) THAT CAN HOLD A COMPUTER, PAPERS, OR A LUNCH BOX - BUT ONLY ONE ITEM AT A TIME. YOU CLEAR THE DESK BEFORE PUTTING SOMETHING NEW. THE DESK SIZE STAYS THE SAME NO MATTER WHAT YOU PUT ON IT.
A MAGIC BOX THAT CONTAINS EITHER AN INTEGER, A CHARACTER, OR A DECIMAL NUMBER - YOU CAN ONLY SEE ONE AT A TIME, BUT THEY ALL FIT IN THE SAME BOX.
ONE PARKING SPACE (MEMORY) WHERE A CAR, BUS, OR BIKE CAN PARK - BUT ONLY ONE AT A TIME. THE SPACE SIZE IS BIG ENOUGH FOR THE LARGEST VEHICLE (LARGEST MEMBER).
